member.name: T:ContractInfo
member.summary: Current information on the smart contract instance, including its balance.

member.name: M:ContractInfo.#ctor(ContractId,AccountId,System.String,Key,DateTimeOffset,System.TimeSpan,AccountId,System.Int64,System.String,Hbar,System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{TokenId,TokenRelationship},LedgerId,StakingInfo)
member.summary: Constructor.
member.param: the account id of the owner
the key that can modify the contract
the time that contract will expire
seconds before contract is renewed (funds must be available)
account ID which will be charged for renewing this account
number of bytes used by this contract
list of compound token id and relationship records

member.name: M:ContractInfo.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Extract the contract from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:ContractInfo.FromProtobuf(Proto.ContractGetInfoResponse.Types.ContractInfo)
member.summary: Extract the contract from the protobuf.

member.name: F:ContractInfo.ContractId
member.summary: ID of the contract instance, in the format used in transactions.

member.name: F:ContractInfo.AccountId
member.summary: ID of the cryptocurrency account owned by the contract instance, in the format used in transactions.

member.name: F:ContractInfo.ContractAccountId
member.summary: ID of both the contract instance and the cryptocurrency account owned by the contract instance, in the format used by Solidity.

member.name: F:ContractInfo.AdminKey
member.summary: The state of the instance and its fields can be modified arbitrarily if this key signs a transaction to modify it. If this is null, then such modifications are not possible, and there is no administrator that can override the normal operation of this smart contract instance. Note that if it is created with no admin keys, then there is no administrator to authorize changing the admin keys, so there can never be any admin keys for that instance.

member.name: F:ContractInfo.ExpirationTime
member.summary: The current time at which this contract instance (and its account) is set to expire.

member.name: F:ContractInfo.AutoRenewPeriod
member.summary: The expiration time will extend every this many seconds. If there are insufficient funds, then it extends as long as possible. If the account is empty when it expires, then it is deleted.

member.name: F:ContractInfo.AutoRenewAccountId
member.summary: ID of the an account to charge for auto-renewal of this contract. If not set, or set to an account with zero hbar balance, the contract's own hbar balance will be used to cover auto-renewal fees.

member.name: F:ContractInfo.Storage
member.summary: Number of bytes of storage being used by this instance (which affects the cost to extend the expiration time).

member.name: F:ContractInfo.ContractMemo
member.summary: The memo associated with the contract (max 100 bytes).

member.name: F:ContractInfo.Balance
member.summary: The current balance of the contract.

member.name: F:ContractInfo.IsDeleted
member.summary: Whether the contract has been deleted

member.name: T:ContractInfo_2
member.summary: The tokens associated to the contract

member.name: F:ContractInfo.LedgerId
member.summary: The ledger ID the response was returned from; please see HIP-198 for the network-specific IDs.

member.name: F:ContractInfo.StakingInfo
member.summary: Staking metadata for this account.

member.name: M:ContractInfo.ToBytes
member.summary: Create a byte array representation.

member.name: M:ContractInfo.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Build the protobuf.
